title: Senior Plant Manager at Haier India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Haier India
jsonLd.description:
Haier India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Haier India:
Haier India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India!
